## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content and marketing services, their technology platform, and potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX combines AI software and expert services to deliver high-quality content and marketing solutions for companies across various stages and industries.](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Their proprietary platform includes a coding agent for building complex workflows, enabling scalable and adaptable content creation and marketing strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [GrowthX is preparing for a Series B round in August/September, focusing on connecting their expert hub, workflow engine, and learning engine.](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Services

  - [Evolved from building publications inside companies to a full-service AI-powered content and marketing solution](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Combines AI software with expert services, allowing for scalable, high-quality outputs](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Works with a range of clients from pre-launch startups to public companies](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Services include content creation, SEO optimization, thought leadership, and custom growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

### Technology Platform and Workflows

  - [Developed a proprietary "Content OS" with a coding agent that builds complex workflows](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Platform includes strategy sprints, artifact creation, and AI-powered content generation and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Enables rapid, high-quality content creation and marketing strategies that are difficult to replicate with low-code tools](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)

### Team Structure and Expertise

  - [Organized similar to a law firm with managing directors, managing editors, and supporting roles](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [High-profile experts from companies like TechCrunch, Shopify, and G2 lead strategy and oversee quality](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Includes AI engineers and design engineers for end-to-end implementation](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### Client Engagement and Capacity

  - [Currently doing 2-3 client kickoffs per week, focusing on quality over quantity](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Replaces multiple agencies for some clients, augments in-house teams for others](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Provides a more cost-effective solution compared to niche players in specific industries](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

### Future Plans and Funding

  - [Preparing for a Series B round in August/September 2025](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Focusing on connecting the expert hub, workflow engine, and learning engine](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Aiming to open up the platform to more customers while maintaining quality and avoiding false signals](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)

## Next Steps

  - Chelcie to send follow-up note with ideas for staying connected
  - Explore potential introductions to marketing leaders in Notable's portfolio and network
  - Consider opportunities for joint events or collaborations (similar to past events with Kleiner Perkins)
  - [Marcel invited Notable team to visit GrowthX's office in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/8jPPAsC7u-_V86iQp7zymWySuMtkyvyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
